title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at Cholamandalam Finance

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at Cholamandalam Finance
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, Cholamandalam Finance in Pimpri-Chinchwad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Cholamandalam Finance:
Cholamandalam Finance is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in IFRS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cholamandalam Finance!
